name: Éclat Orbital
description: Véhicule de désignation de cible intégrant un designateur laser pour frappes orbitales. Pointe rouge persistante sur la cible, puis le ciel s'ouvre. L'arme ultime de précision de l'Hégémonie.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Target designation vehicle with large dorsal laser designator dish, red beam pointing skyward, orbital strike beam descending from clouds above, angular low-profile chassis.
